name: ERC-20 Permit (EIP-2612)
description: Save gas by approving ERC-20 spends with off-chain EIP-2612 signatures instead of a separate approve tx. Foundation for any agent that wants to be x402 / gasless friendly.

steps.description: Read token.name(), token.version() (DOMAIN_SEPARATOR fields), and token.nonces(owner).

rule.comment: permit() emits Approval(owner=agent, spender, value). Validator must confirm the tx contained a permit() call with valid signature for the agent.
